summary: The user inquired about daily habits to improve heart health and expressed a desire to start walking every morning. The conversation also covered making healthy eating more enjoyable through the use of spices, meal planning tips, and the importance of variety in diet.
facts: The user plans to start walking every morning to improve heart health. The user struggles to stick to healthy eating because they do not enjoy the taste of some healthy foods. The user is excited to try out new spices in their cooking to enhance flavor. The user is interested in meal planning to ensure a balanced diet. The assistant recommended experimenting with spices and herbs to make healthy eating more enjoyable. The assistant suggested including a variety of food groups in meals for balanced nutrition. The assistant advised prepping ingredients ahead of time for meal planning. The assistant mentioned the cost-effectiveness of buying ingredients in bulk for healthy options. The assistant emphasized the importance of planning healthy snacks to avoid unhealthy options.
